sqlMap.select: select * from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into SeperateEntitySupp(VersionSequence, PolicyKey EntityNameSe EstablisedSeDate ServiceIndustrySeID PercentOfOwnershipSe TotalProfessionalStaffSe TotalSupportStaffSe DetailedDescSe LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe LastFiscalYearSeEndDate EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #EntityNameSe# #EstablisedSeDate# #ServiceIndustrySeID# #PercentOfOwnershipSe# #TotalProfessionalStaffSe# #TotalSupportStaffSe# #DetailedDescSe# #LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe# #EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe# #LastFiscalYearSeEndDate# #EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate# )
sqlMap.select: select EntityNameSe, EstablisedSeDate, ServiceIndustrySeID, PercentOfOwnershipSe, TotalProfessionalStaffSe, TotalSupportStaffSe, DetailedDescSe, LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe, EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe, LastFiscalYearSeEndDate, EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update SeperateEntitySupp set
EntityNameSe = #EntityNameSe# EntityNameSe = null EstablisedSeDate = #EstablisedSeDate# EstablisedSeDate = null ServiceIndustrySeID = #ServiceIndustrySeID# ServiceIndustrySeID = null PercentOfOwnershipSe = #PercentOfOwnershipSe# PercentOfOwnershipSe = null TotalProfessionalStaffSe = #TotalProfessionalStaffSe# TotalProfessionalStaffSe = null TotalSupportStaffSe = #TotalSupportStaffSe# TotalSupportStaffSe = null DetailedDescSe = #DetailedDescSe# DetailedDescSe = null LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe = #LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe# LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe = null EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe = #EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe# EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe = null LastFiscalYearSeEndDate = #LastFiscalYearSeEndDate# LastFiscalYearSeEndDate = null EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate = #EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate# EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select EntityNameSe, EstablisedSeDate, ServiceIndustrySeID, PercentOfOwnershipSe, TotalProfessionalStaffSe, TotalSupportStaffSe, DetailedDescSe, LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe, EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe, LastFiscalYearSeEndDate, EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, EntityNameSe, EstablisedSeDate, ServiceIndustrySeID, PercentOfOwnershipSe, TotalProfessionalStaffSe, TotalSupportStaffSe, DetailedDescSe, LastFiscalYearGrossRevenueSe, EstimateCurrentYearGrossRevenueSe, LastFiscalYearSeEndDate, EstimateCurrentYearSeEndDate from SeperateEntitySupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
